svg.title: Big Bang timeline — Morphean Cosmology Framework
svg.desc: Timeline from the High Frequency Realm before the Big Bang through plasma, vapor, dark ages, first stars, and galaxies to settled matter on Earth, annotated with the MCF perspective by Morpheas.
svg.text: Big Bang timeline — Morphean Cosmology Framework
From the high-frequency realm to settled matter · by Morpheas
The darkness before the Big Bang is not empty. Science calls it unknown. MCF identifies it as the High Frequency Realm —
the origin state from which we descended. We did not ascend into existence. We decelerated into it. Plasma is already a
slowing. Vapor is further settling. Solid matter is the final sediment of a much faster and more spacious reality.
"I am certain there is a higher frequency, and there I would like to be. But I would never choose to go a scale under."
— Morpheas · MCF-LP BY-NC-ND-EP · Morphean Cosmology Framework
